tools.Name: Open WebUI
tools.Description: A user-friendly, self-hosted AI platform designed to operate entirely offline.
tools.Use_Case: Providing a chat-based interface for LLMs like Ollama and OpenAI-compatible APIs, including support for RAG and web search.

tools.Name: Magika
tools.Description: An AI-powered file type detection tool that uses deep learning for fast and accurate classification.
tools.Use_Case: Automated identification of file types (binary vs. textual) within security and content policy pipelines.

tools.Name: GenericAgent
tools.Description: A minimal, self-evolving autonomous agent framework that builds a skill tree through experience.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex system-level tasks like browser control, file system management, and scripting with autonomous skill accumulation.
